title: Totem of Unmelting
description: Replaces the "Totem of Undying" with the "Totem of unmelting". Replaces Totem with a model of a snow man
body:
Replaces "Totem Of Undying" With the "Totem Of Unmelting". and also as a bonus, quotes from the one and only Codabra as splash messages.

Made By Noob

If you encounter any bugs let me know at @noobsavior12 on discord
